title: Trump administration considers unfreezing $20 billion in Iranian assets — after lambasting Obama for similar move
snippet: Trump administration considering unfreezing $20 billion in Iranian assets in exchange for Tehran giving up its enriched uranium stockpile. Under compromise proposal, some HEU shipped to third country, some down-blended in Iran under international monitoring. Parallels to Obama-era JCPOA but Trump administration frames as fundamentally different. Iran has asked for sanctions relief north of $20B.
tag_reason: CNN confirmation of Axios $20B scoop with additional details on Iran's counter-demand for higher figure
